title: ADR and planning documentation for CopilotKit/AG-UI integration
goal: Create the architectural and execution documentation needed before implementation starts.
non_goals: Do not implement code in this task.
Do not add package dependencies in this task.
Do not change contracts/ai runtime behavior in this task.
acceptance: ADR states the decision and alternatives.
Architecture plan describes target topology, phases, risks and checks.
Operations and deployment docs describe enablement and rollback.
Workflow package contains task packets for the implementation slices.
